reviews.comment: An absolute must-read for any software developer. Timeless advice that still applies decades later.
Packed with practical tips. Some sections feel dated but the core concepts are solid.
A masterpiece of world-building. The political intrigue and ecological themes are unmatched.
Dense but rewarding. Takes patience to get into but absolutely worth it.
Changed how I approach building new habits. The 1% improvement concept is life-changing.
Good ideas but very repetitive. Could have been a long blog post instead of a full book.
